name: Quick & Easy Rainbow Trout #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/4 cup flour, 1/4 cup cornmeal, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon cayenne.
2. Coat the trout fillets with the flour mixture.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Cook the fish for 5-6 minutes on each side until it flakes.
5. Serve with lemon wedges.
